value.found_quote: A research agent used during [plan mode](/en/permission-modes#analyze-before-you-edit-with-plan-mode) to gather context before presenting a plan.
value.rationale: The page describes the built-in Plan subagent as a research agent used during plan mode to gather context before presenting a plan, directly matching the claim. It is listed among always-registered built-in subagents, indicating active status.
